title: Live Session Readiness Drill
description: A lightweight course used to validate live-session scheduling and student join flow.

instructors.name: NCS Training Control
instructors.title: Training Coordinator
instructors.biography: Coordinates live training readiness and operational drills.

learningObjectives: Confirm tenant admin can schedule a live session
Confirm tenant student can see and join the session
Confirm Jitsi session launches inside the tenant context
